name: mcp-html-bridge
description: Universal MCP rendering middleware — schema/data → self-contained HTML UI

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core-ui-engine && npm run build -w packages/core-mcp-client && npm run build -w packages/adapter-cli && npm run build -w packages/adapter-proxy && npm run build -w packages/claude-skill
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/core-ui-engine/dist packages/core-mcp-client/dist packages/adapter-cli/dist packages/adapter-proxy/dist packages/claude-skill/dist
